headline: China’s Semiconductor Equipment Companies Gain Share Despite U.S. Sanctions
summary: Global WFE Market Share and Competitive Positioning Chinese semiconductor equipment vendors continue to gain share within the global WFE market, although the absolute level remains modest. Global leaders such as Applied Materials (AMAT), Lam Research (LRCX), KLA (KLAC), ASML (ASML), Tokyo Electron (TOELY), and Screen still dominate the market, particularly in leading-edge logic and memory. ... China’s Semiconductor Equipment Companies Gain Share Despite U.S. Sanctions
